# Gina Baranski — CX Happiness
> Customer Retention Strategist helping companies keep their customers coming back.

## About
Gina Baranski is a customer retention strategist with 9 years focused on customer experience and over 20 years working across events, tech, sustainability, nonprofit, and Fortune 500 industries. She helps companies reduce churn, improve engagement, and design seamless customer journeys that drive lifetime value.

## Expertise
- Customer lifecycle strategy and management
- Engagement program design and implementation
- Retention strategy across B2B and B2C contexts
- Voice of the customer (VOC) research
- Customer journey mapping and friction reduction
- Communication strategy tied to lifecycle stage

## Career Highlights
- Increased B2B client engagement from 50% to 86% for 2,000+ exhibitor accounts, driving 84% upsell
- Generated $100K+ in additional renewal revenue by implementing lifecycle communication programs for a tech startup
- Conducted qualitative market research at Datacolor to define the voice of the customer
- Redesigned program experiences and engagement strategies using stakeholder research and audience insights

## Industries Served
Arts & Culture, Technology, Sustainability, Nonprofit, Fortune 500, B2B SaaS, Events

## Point of View
Gina believes that reducing friction and intentionally designing a seamless customer journey is more critical than ever. As AI and automation raise customer expectations, tolerance for poor experiences is dropping — making proactive retention strategy a strategic priority, not an afterthought.

## Contact
- Website: https://cxhappiness.com
- Email: gevbaranski@gmail.com
